'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=fg8snfYReE2jjPSM_YPOJyaRjw8yFxUPGSY.3fGv1vk-1774503073-1.0.1.1-uqvnFOSKq3yL.vEf1KYn6J8AJSJPO.aoIK6e7XsG1qU"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
